offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual bookkeeping causes cash flow gaps. We automate bookkeeping instead of manual bookkeeping and spreadsheet management.
problem: Manual bookkeeping processes lead to errors and inefficiencies.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on bookkeeping
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Participate in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try transaction categorization and financial statement generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual bookkeeping issues
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for users
Default reminder schedule presets for tasks
CSV import option for existing client data
One-click export of simple financial reports
Streamline onboarding steps for new users
